archetype: Archetype 2: The Performance Pro (Elite iOS Variant)

surfaces_and_micro_themes.glow_effects: Use blurred colored blobs behind key metrics (e.g., green blur behind winning projection)

projection_card.description: The centerpiece. Use a Bento grid inside the card. Player portrait on left, large probability number on right with sparkline chart.
projection_card.visuals: Gradient overlay on the player photo. Thin inner stroke border-white/10. High contrast numbers.

bottom_navigation.description: iOS style docked bottom nav. Large tap targets. Active state has a subtle glowing dot or vibrant color tint. Unselected items faded to text_secondary.

stat_progress_bars.description: Used in Tracking Tab. 4px or 6px height, full rounded. Vibrant primary color with a glowing drop-shadow effect to represent live momentum.

scan_results_cards.description: Display uploaded image details side-by-side with tactical breakdown in an asymmetrical bento view.

animations.page_transition: Fade in and slight upward translation (framer-motion).
animations.list_stagger: Delay each card by 0.05s on initial load for a cascading reveal effect.

stadium_background.description: Use as a very low opacity (10%) background texture for the main dashboard header or login screen.

basketball_action.description: Example player image for ProjectionCards or Matchup overviews.

user_avatar.description: User profile avatar image for the Profile Tab or Header.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme colors provided. DO NOT use generic Tailwind grays (slate/gray). Stick to the #0a0a0f and #161622 palette.
Ensure all interactive elements have hover and active states (scale down slightly on active).
Use Manrope for all numbers and statistics to ensure crisp, geometric legibility.
Implement the ProjectionCard as a premium glassmorphic bento box. Do not make it a simple flat card. Add inner 1px borders.
Ensure the Bottom Navigation spans the full width at the bottom, mimicking an elite iOS native app.
All components must have data-testid attributes for testing.
Leverage F-Pattern for analytics: Key metrics (North Star) go top-left.
Do not use generic 'card' wrappers if they compromise the bento grid or asymmetrical layouts.
